plugins.name: claude-code-skill-master-plugin
plugins.description: A Claude Code plugin that adds the Skill Master skill — a guided assistant for creating and editing Claude Code skills with proper structure and frontmatter.

plugins.name: delivery-manager
plugins.description: Delivery Manager plugin with agents and skills for CakePHP/Vue.js project management. Includes delivery-manager as the main orchestrator, plus business-analyst, solution-architect, cakephp-developer, database-architect, vue-developer, and project-context-manager agents.
